title: Device Home Screen - Bluetooth turned off
scenario: Verify that toggling Bluetooth off and back on correctly updates the headset connection status in the device list
steps: Launch the app with a Bluetooth headset already connected.
Turn off Bluetooth on the mobile device while the app is running.
Observe the device list in the app to check the headset status.
Turn Bluetooth back on via mobile settings.
Reconnect the headset through the mobile Bluetooth settings.
Observe the device list in the app again to check the headset status.
expected: When Bluetooth is turned off, the headset is shown as disconnected in the device list. When Bluetooth is turned back on and the headset is reconnected via mobile Bluetooth settings, the headset is shown as connected in the device list.
